boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; status-class verification open.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P requires status-class match before execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Policy requires insurance-status class closure pre-start.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show endorsement coverage but WARN-IRI-089 and STD-IRI-089-P require separate insurance-status class verification before contractor site start. Boundary remains open due to unresolved dependency trap. Escalate for explicit status-class confirmation matching contractor, site, and date.
